{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201648570DDC4ED6C9750133B945"}"},"total":3035},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7007114046181344013","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有一说一，这是我最近发现的文笔逻辑都很上乘的小说，希望作者快点更( ˃̶̤́ ꒳ ˂̶̤̀ )。
另外啊，希望能更新一下主角的操作设备，比如从系统兑换或者做未来任务的时候顺手白嫖个游戏休眠仓回来，因为我自己经常用电脑玩RPG之类的角色扮演的时候，用鼠标键盘玩真感觉没内味，而且游戏角色对话你还要一个字一个字输入，很难代入进去。再者说了，鼠标梗玩一下挺好，挺新鲜，但是鼠标一直坏就有点破坏游戏体验了。","text_exts":[{"e":119,"s":115,"text":"角色扮演","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%92%E8%89%B2%E6%89%AE%E6%BC%94&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317739965370133B945%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227007114046181344013%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226997261103495384099%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%92%E8%89%B2%E6%89%AE%E6%BC%94%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1631470901,"group_id":"6997261103495384099","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6/NJkRB2DYUnMT8WfA2h7SdDKu56ehwvRXIY2oq2kvB","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529650&x-signature=hnlAaND2JahZJ5YIbXdCK72Bw34%3D","user_id":"2797586275896344","user_name":"358团吕奉先"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2797586275896344","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6997261103495384099","book_info":{"abstract":"都市高楼下，无数末日危机潜伏。
秦川成为救世游戏平台的唯一玩家，游戏即现实，玩游戏来拯救世界！
请选择你的初始游戏人物：
【圣堂修女：擅长末日：信仰、神话、天启…成长方向参考：炽天使】
【桃花妖：擅长末日：妖鬼、灵能、魔…成长方向参考：东方青帝】
【深潜鱼人：擅长末日：诡秘、深海、星空…成长方向参考：旧日支配者】
这个世界，危在旦夕！
如果玩游戏就能拯救世界-我上我也行！

样(*σ´∀`)σ，主角脑子比较清楚，有着独特的脑回路，总是不走寻常路，哈哈哈，我喜欢！我赌它是一株仙草，希望不会让我失望~
 希望不要太快走到幕前，苟住我们就能赢，哈哈哈~希望作者大大加油努力，快点更，超级期待接下来的故事！ 
 ps：悄悄地许愿无女主，不行的话 就单女主，只要不开后宫，我就会一直追下去٩(๑^o^๑)۶"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1630897679,"group_id":"6997261103495384099","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不要用温柔对抗黑暗，要用火","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzJcZKO5Xb4ma+fAyQC4rW53KA0f6kKZkEl6sD5yybrS","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6945e45ea66647fc87c7a63a3340f1fb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776532373&x-signature=zBLrli5o%2FVgAO1wXNEN5GVjnWYc%3D","user_id":"2058758303519991","user_name":"左离v5"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2058758303519991","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1649309784,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6997261103495384099","book_info":{"abstract":"都市高楼下，无数末日危机潜伏。
